channel.title: Signals — Merge Combinator
channel.description: Perspectives on defense innovation, operator-driven development, and the future of national security technology.

item.title: Drones Were the First Chapter
item.description: Russia is bolting turbojets onto Shahed airframes faster than interceptor drones can catch them. The budget is buying the last war. The cost-exchange reset is moving to cheap autonomous missiles.

item.title: A Disciplined Case for the A-10
item.description: The Air Force says the A-10 flies until 2030. The budget says otherwise. Why proven combat power is being written off, and what it costs to wait.

item.title: Two Services Restructured Acquisition in Six Weeks. Most Builders Missed It.
item.description: The Navy and Air Force both restructured major acquisition authorities in under two months. The signal is structural.

item.title: The Army Is Rewriting How It Buys Technology
item.description: The Army is restructuring acquisition around software velocity and operational feedback loops.

item.title: MCHMR Delivers Tactical Edge Dominance During African Lion 26
item.description: Real-time Arabic-to-English AI translation over MPU5 radios. Allied and partner sensors feeding a shared common operational picture.

item.title: Missionized Tech Residency
item.description: Embedding acquisition professionals inside industry for six months. In partnership with the US Army and DAU.

item.title: The $16B Alignment Problem
item.description: $16 billion in defense VC. The question isn't money. It's whether the system can absorb it.

item.title: DAWG's $54.6B Problem
item.description: A 24,000% budget increase doesn't fix a broken acquisition system. It amplifies it.

item.title: From Combine to Series A: Ulysses
item.description: 29th of 83 companies. Then $46M from a16z. What operator-validated formation actually produces.

item.title: The Interceptor Math Is Broken
item.description: 25% of the stockpile, gone in 12 days. The Indo-Pacific math is worse.

item.title: Inside JIATF 401: The Counter-Drone Marketplace
item.description: The Pentagon is building an "app store" for counter-drone solutions. Here's what it takes to get listed.

item.title: 9 Months Under Fire: USS Eisenhower
item.description: 770+ weapons expended. The most intense carrier combat since WWII.

item.title: FY26 NDAA: What the SPEED Act Means
item.description: Faster procurement doesn't mean more money. Here's what actually changes.
